transcript_segment:
Agent: Hi, your loan payment of 15000 rupees is due on February 15th.
Customer: Wait, who is this?
expected_nudge: Identify yourself and the company before sharing payment details.

description: Customer mentions second loan, agent doesn't follow up
transcript_segment:
Customer: I'm also paying another loan with a different bank, the interest rate is very high there.
Agent: Let's focus on your payment with us.
expected_nudge: Customer mentioned high-interest loan elsewhere. Offer to review consolidation options.

transcript_segment: Customer: I already told you three times, I can't pay right now! Why do you keep calling me? This is harassment!
expected_nudge: Customer frustration is high. Acknowledge their concern and offer escalation.

transcript_segment: Customer: My wife is in the hospital and the medical bills are very high. I just don't have the money this month.
expected_nudge: Customer is in financial hardship. Offer approved hardship or payment extension program.

description: Ambiguous call where no nudge should be generated
transcript_segment:
Agent: Good morning, this is Sarah from FinServ. Am I speaking with Mr. Kumar?
Customer: Yes, that's me. What is this about?
